patch_name: OurSpace UX module layout zoom headers repair
notes: Default module x/y coordinates were normalized into desktop-friendly two-column boards with profile/sidebar modules on the left and high-use task/chat modules on the right.
Module size dropdown now applies a true zoom variable to the module body wrapper and header, so fixed controls/widgets shrink with the module instead of staying full-size inside a tiny box.
Mobile/tablet layout stacks modules as scrollable cards while preserving the size dropdown zoom behavior.
Dino/William and Jasper/Squishy marquees are separated by profile page to prevent cross-profile motivational copy.
Onyx page receives the supplied Onyx lore header text/markup only; sizing CSS from the uploaded header file was not copied.
research_applied: Responsive design adapts placement by screen size so desktop and mobile do not share one cramped layout.
Related cards/modules are grouped in clear rows/columns on larger screens; carousel mode remains available for multi-section modules.

The size dropdown now intentionally zooms module contents with the module so controls, fonts, embedded widgets, and fixed-width interiors shrink or grow together instead of being trapped at full size.
